tasks.label: ReliefLink: Check Tooling (Node + pnpm)
args: -lc

if ! command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Node.js is not installed. Install Node.js 20+ first.' && exit 1; fi; if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm --version; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm --version; else echo 'pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack.' && exit 1; fi

tasks.label: ReliefLink: Install Dependencies
args: -lc

if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm install; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm install; else echo 'pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack.' && exit 1; fi

tasks.label: ReliefLink: Prisma Generate (Auth)
args: -lc

if [ -f .env ]; then set -a && source .env && set +a; fi; if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm --filter @relieflink/auth-service prisma:generate; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm --filter @relieflink/auth-service prisma:generate; else echo 'pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack.' && exit 1; fi

tasks.label: ReliefLink: Prisma Migrate (Auth)
args: -lc

if [ -f .env ]; then set -a && source .env && set +a; fi; if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm --filter @relieflink/auth-service prisma:migrate; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm --filter @relieflink/auth-service prisma:migrate; else echo 'pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack.' && exit 1; fi

tasks.label: ReliefLink: Build All
args: -lc

if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm build; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm build; else echo 'pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack.' && exit 1; fi

tasks.label: ReliefLink: Run Full Stack (Dev)
args: -lc

if [ -f .env ]; then set -a && source .env && set +a; fi; if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm dev; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm dev; else echo 'pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack.' && exit 1; fi

tasks.label: ReliefLink: Run Web Only
args: -lc

if [ -f .env ]; then set -a && source .env && set +a; fi; if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm dev:web; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm dev:web; else echo 'pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack.' && exit 1; fi

tasks.label: ReliefLink: Health Check APIs
args: -lc
curl -s http://localhost:3005/health && echo && curl -s http://localhost:3001/health && echo

tasks.label: ReliefLink: Smoke API
args: -lc

if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm test:api-smoke; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm test:api-smoke; else echo 'pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack.' && exit 1; fi

tasks.label: ReliefLink: Smoke UI
args: -lc

if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm test:ui-smoke; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm test:ui-smoke; else echo 'pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack.' && exit 1; fi

tasks.label: ReliefLink: Setup (Tooling + Install + Generate + Migrate + Build)
